rationale: The cited paper appears theoretically relevant rather than incidental: it focuses on construal-related weighting of feasibility/desirability via process- vs outcome-focused thought, while the citing paper’s core mechanism is mind-set/construal effects on feasibility vs precision in promotion response. Given this close construct/mechanism overlap (and a direct DOI match), the citation could be serving as a substantive theory source and should not be dropped at triage.
